Title: Title
Oj! Den här sidan verkar ha missat målet: Oops! This page seems to have missed the goal. Maybe the link has moved or gone to rest. Take a new shot from the home page and keep playing!
Tack vare Athletiqa kunde jag fokusera h: Thanks to Athletiqa, I could focus entirely on training and reach the next level in my career.
Vi använder modern och branschstandardis: We use modern and industry-standard security technology (such as SSL encryption) to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, or manipulation. Our chat feature is closed to unauthorized users and can be reviewed by our moderators if a user is reported for rule violations, to ensure the safety of our athletes.
Athletiqa is the platform that connects: Athletiqa is the platform that connects young athletes with sponsors and individuals who want to support the next generation. We believe talent should not be limited by finances.
faq.platform.q1.question: What is the purpose of the platform?
faq.platform.q1.answer: The platform is created to connect athletes and associations in need of financial support with individuals and companies who want to sponsor. Athletes can create donation campaigns stating their needs, and sponsors can easily contribute to their journey.
faq.platform.q2.question: Who can use the platform?
faq.platform.q2.answer: All athletes, regardless of level or sport, can create a profile and apply for support. Sponsors can be individuals, companies, or organizations that want to contribute to the development of sports.
faq.platform.q3.question: How do donations work?
faq.platform.q3.answer: Sponsors choose a donation campaign or an athlete they want to support and make a donation via the platform's payment solution. The donation goes directly to the athlete or association.
faq.platform.q4.question: What is a donation campaign card?
faq.platform.q4.answer: A donation card is a presentation where the athlete describes a specific need, such as equipment, competition fees, or travel. This makes it easier for sponsors to understand what their contribution goes toward.
faq.platform.q5.question: Do sponsors get a receipt?
faq.platform.q5.answer: Yes. After each donation, the sponsor receives a digital receipt confirming the payment.
faq.platform.q6.question: Does the platform charge any fee?
faq.platform.q6.answer: The platform may charge a minor service fee to cover operations, development, and payment handling. This is always clearly displayed before the donation is completed.
faq.platform.q7.question: Do I have to be an elite athlete to get support?
faq.platform.q7.answer: No. The platform is open to everyone – from beginners and youth athletes to elite competitors and sports associations.
faq.platform.q8.question: How do I contact an athlete or association?
faq.platform.q8.answer: After free registration, the platform offers a messaging system where sponsors and athletes can communicate in a secure and controlled manner.
faq.athlete.q1.question: How do I create a campaign?
faq.athlete.q1.answer: Go to your profile, select Create Campaign, describe what you need support for, and fill out all inputs. Sponsors can then donate via Swish.
faq.athlete.q2.question: What happens once I reach my funding goal?
faq.athlete.q2.answer: You need to create a confirmation update post showing that the purchase or activity has been completed. This builds trust and unlocks the ability to create more campaigns.
faq.athlete.q3.question: Can I chat with sponsors?
faq.athlete.q3.answer: Yes, but only via direct communication between you and a specific sponsor. There is no feature to chat with other athletes.
faq.athlete.q4.question: Can I have multiple active campaigns simultaneously?
faq.athlete.q4.answer: You can have a maximum of 2 active campaigns at the same time.
faq.sponsors.q1.question: How do I find athletes to support?
faq.sponsors.q1.answer: You can search by sport or filter based on whether you want to donate to an association or an individual. You can also follow athletes to receive updates.
faq.sponsors.q2.question: How do I donate?
faq.sponsors.q2.answer: Donations are made via Swish directly from the platform.
faq.sponsors.q3.question: Do I get confirmation that the money is used correctly?
faq.sponsors.q3.answer: Yes. The athlete is required to create a confirmation post once the campaign objectives are fulfilled.
faq.sponsors.q4.question: Can I remain anonymous?
faq.sponsors.q4.answer: Yes, you can choose to donate anonymously. The athlete will not see your name, and no one can find you via the search bar.
faq.sponsors.q5.question: Can I follow an athlete without donating?
faq.sponsors.q5.answer: Yes. You can follow athletes to view their updates and achievements, but you must register for a free account.
faq.sponsors.q6.question: How does the medal system work?
faq.sponsors.q6.answer: Medals are awarded based on the number of donations you have completed. You can also share your milestones on social media.
faq.companies.q1.question: Can companies sponsor athletes?
faq.companies.q1.answer: Yes. Companies can create profiles, sponsor athletes, and earn profile medals for their donations.
faq.companies.q2.question: Can associations register their individual athletes?
faq.companies.q2.answer: No. Associations can create their own profile to represent their organization, but each athlete must create their own individual account and specify their club on their profile. Associations can, however, follow their athletes, support them, and share their campaigns.
faq.companies.q3.question: Is company branding available?
faq.companies.q3.answer: Yes. Companies can display their logo, description, and earned contribution medals.
faq.payment.q1.question: How do payments work?
faq.payment.q1.answer: All donations are processed via Swish. You will be redirected to the Swish app to approve the payment transaction.
faq.payment.q2.question: Does the platform charge an operational fee?
faq.payment.q2.answer: No, the platform does not charge any additional fees.
faq.payment.q3.question: Can I get an invoice or receipt?
faq.payment.q3.answer: Yes, you will receive a digital confirmation receipt sent to your email address.
faq.payment.q4.question: What happens if a Swish payment fails?
faq.payment.q4.answer: You will receive an error message and can try again. No donation is registered in the system until Swish confirms a successful transaction.
faq.payment.q5.question: Can I request a refund?
faq.payment.q5.answer: Refunds are handled manually and require reaching out to customer support. Eligibility depends on the specific situation and whether the funds have already been utilized by the athlete.
faq.guardians.q1.question: Can I create an account for my child?
faq.guardians.q1.answer: Yes. Anyone under the age of 18 must have a guardian linked to the account. If your child is under 13, the account must be created under your name.
faq.guardians.q2.question: Can I manage campaigns on behalf of my child?
faq.guardians.q2.answer: Yes. If your child is under 13, you manage the campaigns completely. If your child is over 13, they can draft their own campaigns, but you must approve them via email.
faq.guardians.q3.question: Can I restrict who contacts my child?
faq.guardians.q3.answer: Yes. You can disable the chat feature completely in settings under the 'For Guardians' tab.
faq.guardians.q4.question: Can I monitor all messages my child receives?
faq.guardians.q4.answer: Yes. As a guardian, you have full transparency and visibility over their communications.
faq.security.q1.question: Is the platform secure?
faq.security.q1.answer: Yes. All data is processed in compliance with GDPR guidelines, and payments are executed securely through Swish.
faq.security.q2.question: Who can see my personal details?
faq.security.q2.answer: Only the information you explicitly choose to display publicly. Financial or payment details are never shared with third parties.
faq.security.q3.question: How are minor accounts protected?
faq.security.q3.answer: Minors must have a guardian linked and benefit from elevated safety configurations regarding profile visibility and contact options.
faq.security.q4.question: Can I block other users?
faq.security.q4.answer: Yes. You can block both athletes and sponsors. To manage your list of blocked accounts, navigate to Settings -> Security.
faq.security.q5.question: How is the platform moderated?
faq.security.q5.answer: Reported content is evaluated manually. Campaigns, profiles, and comments can be removed if they violate our community guidelines.
faq.security.q6.question: How are minors protected from unsolicited messages?
faq.security.q6.answer: Only verified sponsors can initiate contact with them, and guardians can shut down messaging entirely. Depending on report volume, problematic accounts face warnings, temporary bans, or permanent removal.
faq.security.q7.question: How do I report suspicious activity?
faq.security.q7.answer: Use the built-in report feature accessible directly on profiles, updates, or messages. Our support team evaluates every case.
faq.technical.q1.question: I can't log in – what should I do?
faq.technical.q1.answer: Verify that you are using the correct email and password. If issues persist, you can reset your credentials via the 'Forgot Password' option, or contact support.
faq.technical.q2.question: How do I update my password?
faq.technical.q2.answer: Navigate to Settings → Security → Change Password. You will need to provide your current password to authorize the change.
faq.technical.q3.question: How do I update my profile image or details?
faq.technical.q3.answer: Go to Settings → Profile Settings. There you can modify your image, bio text, sport categories, and other details.
faq.technical.q4.question: How do I delete my account?
faq.technical.q4.answer: Navigate to Settings → Security → Delete Account. Once requested, your records are deleted permanently after a 30-day grace period.
faq.technical.q5.question: I'm not receiving notifications – how do I fix this?
faq.technical.q5.answer: Ensure notifications are enabled in both the platform application and your operating system settings. You can tailor your preferences under Settings → Notifications.
faq.technical.q6.question: What if the platform isn't loading or behaving correctly?
faq.technical.q6.answer: Try reloading the page, restarting the app, or logging out and back in. If the bug persists, please submit a report to technical support.
faq.rules.q1.question: What content is prohibited from being posted?
faq.rules.q1.answer: Posts must not contain hate speech, harassment, discrimination, violence, explicit adult content, spam, or misinformation. All updates must align with our core values and Swedish legislation.
faq.rules.q2.question: What are the penalties for violating platform guidelines?
faq.rules.q2.answer: Depending on severity, your post may be deleted, and your account may receive an official warning, temporary restriction, or permanent ban.
faq.rules.q3.question: How does content moderation operate?
faq.rules.q3.answer: Flagged entries are evaluated manually by our compliance team. The moderation team determines if rules were violated and executes necessary enforcement actions.
faq.rules.q4.question: What constitutes prohibited contact?
faq.rules.q4.answer: Any behavior involving harassment, intimidation, coercion, inappropriate advances, or communication unrelated to sports and sponsorship activities is forbidden.
faq.rules.q5.question: Can random unauthenticated accounts contact minor athletes?
faq.rules.q5.answer: No. Minor accounts can only be messaged by fully verified platform sponsors, and guardians maintain the power to close chat paths entirely.
faq.rules.q6.question: What is the expected behavior code on the platform?
faq.rules.q6.answer: Be respectful, maintain constructive and sport-centric interactions, and respect the core goal of the platform: empowering athletes through safe, reliable sponsorship.
Gör skillnad direkt - med eller utan kon: Make a difference instantly - with or without an account
Hos oss väljer du själv hur du vill bidr: With us, you choose exactly how you want to contribute. You can quickly and easily donate without registering. If you or your company create an account instead, you get your own profile where you can collect medals for your achievements, display your support publicly, and follow the athletes' journeys up close.
Att stötta unga idrottare handlar om mer: Supporting young athletes is about more than just financial contributions – encouragement is just as important! If you create an account, you get the opportunity to chat directly with the athletes you have helped. A simple 'good luck' before the next match or training camp can mean more than you think.
Sponsorer kan heja på atleterna: Sponsors can cheer on the athletes
Gör en insats och bli belönad! När du el: Make an impact and get rewarded! When you or your company support multiple athletes, or reach a certain donation amount, you are awarded profile medals. You can then easily share these on social media to proudly showcase your support for the next generation of sports stars.
Hitta nästa dröm att stötta: Find the next dream to support
Nu när du är inloggad har du direktkonta: Now that you are logged in, you have direct contact with the athletes you support. Jump into the chat and send a 'good luck' before the next match or ask how training is going. Your personal engagement and a few encouraging words mean just as much as the financial contribution.
Varje bidrag räknas och tar er närmare n: Every contribution counts and brings you closer to the next achievement! On your profile, you can easily track which medals you have earned through your donations. Click through to view your achievements and share them proudly on social media to inspire more people to make a difference.
Berätta din historia! Beskriv dina drömm: Tell your story! Describe your dreams, your current situation, and why a financial contribution would make a difference for you specifically. The more you share your passion for the sport, the easier it becomes for sponsors to want to support your development.
När profilen är på plats är det dags att: Once your profile is set up, it's time to launch your first campaign! State exactly what you need support for – whether it's an away tournament, new running shoes, or your membership fee. Set a clear funding goal and describe how the campaign will help you move forward in your athletic journey.
Din insamling är öppen och synlig för al: Your campaign is live and visible to all visitors on Athletiqa, even those without an account. But to reach your goal faster, it's smart to leverage your network! Share your profile on social media and ask family, friends, and club teammates to pass it along. The more people who see your campaign, the better your chances of reaching the finish line.
Behöver du nya fotbollsskor, hjälp med a: Need new football boots, help with the fee for the next tournament, or a contribution toward training camp? By creating a campaign, you can share your dreams and get the exact financial support you need to keep developing in your sport.
Dela med dig av din resa! Genom att skap: Share your journey! By creating update posts, you can show your sponsors how you are doing. Post a photo from your latest match, share how training is going, or take the opportunity to say thank you for the support. An active profile where you share your experiences builds higher engagement and proves that the contributions make a real difference.
Kommunikation är en viktig del av din sa: Communication is a vital part of your athletic journey. Use the chat feature to build strong bonds with your supporters. Whether it's getting well wishes from friends or showing appreciation to a new sponsor, this feature makes it easy to maintain personal and close contact with everyone cheering you on.
Vi är Athletiqa – en plattform med målet: We are Athletiqa – a platform with the goal of keeping dreams alive and young people involved in sports. Often, finances halt the development of young athletes, which can lead to them leaving the supportive community of sports. Here, as a sports enthusiast, you can step in and directly support a young talent with the resources they need to continue training and competing. Together, we build a future where talent and determination decide, not the wallet.
Idrott förändrar liv, men ekonomin sätte: Sports change lives, but finances often stand in the way
Sports provide a fantastic safe haven for young people. It builds character, creates lifelong community, and stands as one of the absolute strongest protective factors for keeping youth away from negative environments. But as training fees, tournament trips, and sports equipment become increasingly expensive, many young talents are forced to give up on their passion. We didn't think it was fair for the wallet to dictate who gets to keep chasing their dream.
That is why we created Athletiqa.
Vi ville bygga en trygg mötesplats där u: We wanted to build a safe meeting place where young, driven athletes can connect with individuals and companies who want to make a real difference.
På Athletiqa gör vi det enkelt för idrot: At Athletiqa, we make it simple for athletes to tell their story and collect the funds they need to take the next step.
Samtidigt gör vi det otroligt smidigt fö: At the same time, we make it incredibly seamless for passionate sports enthusiasts and companies to step in as sponsors, follow the athletes' journeys up close, and contribute both financial support and vital encouragement.
Vi bakom plattformen Athletiqa grundades: We behind the Athletiqa platform were founded as a project with a clear vision: to tear down the financial barriers in youth sports. We are a team passionate about the power of sports, smart design, and the desire to make society a little better – one campaign at a time.
Ingen ska behöva sluta idrotta på grund: No one should have to quit sports due to a lack of financial means. Sports should be accessible to everyone.
Säkerhet och transparens är vårt största: Security and transparency are our main focus. We offer a secure environment where guardians, athletes, and sponsors can feel completely safe.
Vi skapar band mellan de som peppar och: We create bonds between those who encourage and those who strive. By bringing the team, the club, and supporters together in one place, we build a stronger sports movement together.

Kunde inte skicka. Försök igen om en stu: Could not send. Please try again in a moment.
